title: Royalford Smart Fry Pan with Durable Granite Coating, Forged Aluminium Non-Stick Induction Hob 5-Layer Construction & Cool Touch Handle, 24 Cm, Black
features: ✅ 【NON-STICK GRANITE COATING】 - With a rugged non-stick Granite coating for improved performance, easy cooking and cleaning. Comes with embossed bottom for quick & even heat distribution. Efficient heat transfer ensures the contents cook evenly throughout.

✅ 【HEALTHY EATING MADE EASY】 - Whether you need to scramble an egg, fry a chicken, sear a steak or sauté your vegetables, preparing pasta, sauces, vegetables and re-heating any leftovers, this frying pan is perfect to enjoy varieties of dishes. It cooks up fast, healthy family meals using less oil for healthy eating.

✅【TOUGH AND DURABLE】- Made of Aluminium with 5-ply thickened non-stick interior stands up to everyday use and chip-resistant, with durable granite coating and extra thick Induction base. It is PFOA free, No need to worry about reacting with food or altering natural flavours.

✅ 【MULTIPLE HOB TYPES】 - It features an induction base, making it suitable for use on most hob types. Suitable for multiple cooking sources (stove & cooktops): hot plate/ gas / ceramic / Halogen cooktops for ultimate long-lasting flexibility. It heats up quickly & evenly, so you don’t get the ‘hot spots. Meets Any Cooking Needs Like Egg Pan, Omelette Pan, or Grill pan.

✅ 【INDUCTION BASE, ERGONOMIC HANDLE 】– Extra-thick dot induction base for quick & even heaty distribution and retention. To make things easier, the skillet pan is lightweight for ultimate comfort & safety with every use, helps to lift, shake, & move your pan;
description: Product Description Forged Aluminium Build Durable and lightweight design ensures even heat distribution for efficient cooking. Non-Stick Marble Coating Ensures effortless cooking and easy cleaning while requiring less oil for healthier meals. Thick Induction Base (3.8mm) Provides even heat distribution for efficient cooking on all hob types, including induction. 100% PFOA & PTFE Free Safe, non-toxic coating ensures healthy cooking with no harmful chemicals Compatible with All Hobs Suitable for gas, electric, ceramic, halogen, and induction cooktops for versatile cooking. Smart 28CM Design Ideal size for versatile cooking, ensuring even heat distribution and efficient meal preparation. Easy to use Designed for effortless cooking with a non-stick surface, ergonomic handle, and quick heat distribution. Easy to carry Lightweight and portable design ensures convenient handling and effortless transportation.
